final:
module flash_memory_cell (
    input wire data,
    input wire write_enable,
    output reg stored_data
);
    always @(*) begin
        if (write_enable) begin
            stored_data = data;
        end
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      stored_data = ~data;
    end
  end

endmodule
